h3a7ea9efg8156g41c3gaf09g70207d327829: The road to Baldur's Gate looks a little less daunting now that we're all back together.
hee43f203g2c89g4d38ga961g228013794203: Arabella has behaved herself - so far. A miracle in itself. Thank you again.

h7e06b90dg409eg4b06g8df4ge4b434a72139: Unless you have news of Arabella I don't want to hear it.
h42862ed7g5559g454bga0adg8ed1e5e47ade: She was bitten by a snake. It happened quickly. She felt no pain.

hee86df00gdc1dg4d56ga8deg5904b9166834: Believe me or don't. It won't bring your daughter back.

h8723093ag3f02g4ec5g9588g0c265d468579: Are you having a laugh? Is this funny to you?
hb417aad3g1f0fg434bg9217gd193b054cdba: Enough. No point mislaying our trust. We'll get Bells back on our own.

hb4e775adgce98g4e90g82begd7ce82309525: She is cradled in the Moonmaiden's embrace now.

h03760ef6gd7ccg407eg83bcg0c834de9991b: Kelemvor has taken her by the hand and guided her to the afterlife. She is safe now.
hcb5cf247gf007g46e5g9eb9g71a430f2da0f: That trial was a farce. Moradin will ensure her death does not go unpunished.
h53a86e3agcb67g4a8dgb4e5gc92ea21a11ca: I will pray to Glittergold. He will watch over her - and her soul will be filled with peace and laughter.
hc0aa0d65gd0c9g4fafgad08gb19e245d3491: Little is more imporant than family. Yondalla will watch over your daughter - I promise.

h50c0784eg1fbdg4199g9830gb6f54860eeba: Hang on, love. This'll be over soon enough - we just gotta wait a bit longer.
h0e7f754dgef85g48cbga57ag00fff61c2784: Thank you. Sincerely. I don't know what we'd do without our little girl.
h8fabb7a6gcb39g43d7ga201geb150473dca3: Kagha killed your daughter. She called her a 'parasite' and a 'threat'.
h88d16995g86e0g43d6g9f2fgabb2cc8122d2: Unless you have news of Arabella I don't want to hear it.
h4af5a46fg7d6cg4889g8392g3a3ab2eeb61b: Please - she's been in there too long. It's not safe.
h15030677gdb21g44c4gba59g2b3c9b6709e2: I'll rush the guards. You sprint past.

h1415a6beg902eg4bddga83fgbe6049566999: Arabella tried to steal their idol. Druids lost their damn minds about it - they need it for their precious ritual.
h8b9f685dgc413g40cbg8eafgc8b198a49e35: It's all my fault. I told her I wished the wretched thing would just disappear - or better yet, explode.

h8de9e216g0c00g4e59g99a4gd0801201cff8: And you should bugger off. Now.
